mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO memberPayment ( id,
name,
orderCode,
applicationID,
companyID,
siteID,
deviceID,
memberOrderID,
objectDefineID,
objectID,
objectName,
memberID,
receiveMemberID,
applyTime,
receiveCompanyID,
amount,
description,
paywayID,
paySequence,
paymentType,
verification,
payFrom,
payTime,
status,
ipaddr,
currencyDefineID,
createdTime, modifiedTime, isValid, isLock ) VALUES( #{id},
#{name},
#{orderCode},
#{applicationID},
#{companyID},
#{siteID},
#{deviceID},
#{memberOrderID},
#{objectDefineID},
#{objectID},
#{objectName},
#{memberID},
#{receiveMemberID},
#{applyTime},
#{receiveCompanyID},
#{amount},
#{description},
#{paywayID},
#{paySequence},
#{paymentType},
#{verification},
#{payFrom},
#{payTime},
#{status},
#{ipaddr},
#{currencyDefineID},
NOW(), NOW(), 1, 0 )

INSERT INTO memberPay ( id,
name,
applicationID,
siteID,
companyID,
description,
orderCode,
memberID,
receiveMemberID,
dealType,
amount,
status,
verification,
currencyDefineID,
rightType,
createdTime, modifiedTime, isValid, isLock ) VALUES( #{id},
#{name},
#{applicationID},
#{siteID},
#{companyID},
#{description},
#{orderCode},
#{memberID},
#{receiveMemberID},
#{dealType},
#{amount},
#{status},
#{verification},
#{currencyDefineID},
#{rightType},
NOW(), NOW(), 1, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM memberPayment WHERE id=#{id} AND isValid=1 AND isLock=0
SELECT * FROM memberPayment WHERE id=#{id} AND isValid=1 AND isLock=0
SELECT * FROM memberPay WHERE id=#{id} AND isValid=1 AND isLock=0
mapper.update:
UPDATE memberPayment
paySequence=#{paySequence},
payTime=#{payTime},
status=#{status},
amount=#{amount},
paywayID=#{paywayID},
payFrom=#{payFrom},
orderCode=#{orderCode},
objectDefineID=#{objectDefineID},
objectID=#{objectID},
isValid=#{isValid},
isLock=#{isLock},
modifier=#{modifier},
modifiedTime=NOW()
WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT payTime FROM memberPayment WHERE id=#{id} AND isValid=1 AND isLock=0
SELECT * FROM memberPayment WHERE objectID=#{objectID} AND isValid=1 AND isLock=0 ORDER BY createdTime DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT mp.id memberPaymentID,mp.*,a.name applicationName,c.name companyName,s.name siteName,m.name memberName, mb.name memberBankName,my.name memberPaywayName,rc.name receiveCompanyName,rs.name receiveShopName, rm.name receiveMemberName,p.name paywayName,rp.name returnPaywayName,ct.userName creatorName, mf.userName modifierName,pay.name payCurrencyDefineName FROM memberPayment mp LEFT JOIN application a ON a.id=mp.applicationID LEFT JOIN company c ON c.id=mp.companyID LEFT JOIN site s ON s.id=mp.siteID LEFT JOIN member m ON m.id=mp.memberID LEFT JOIN memberbank mb ON mb.id=mp.memberBankID LEFT JOIN memberpayway my ON my.id=mp.memberPaywayID LEFT JOIN company rc ON rc.id=mp.receiveCompanyID LEFT JOIN shop rs ON rs.id=mp.receiveShopID LEFT JOIN member rm ON rm.id=mp.receiveMemberID LEFT JOIN payway p ON p.id=mp.paywayID LEFT JOIN payway rp ON rp.id=mp.returnPaywayID LEFT JOIN user ct ON ct.id=mp.creator LEFT JOIN user mf ON mf.id=mp.modifier LEFT JOIN currencyDefine pay ON pay.id=mp.payCurrencyDefineID WHERE mp.id=#{id}

SELECT m.id memberPaymentID, m.*, a1.name applicationName, c2.name companyName, s3.name siteName, m4.name memberName, d5.name deviceName, m8.name memberOrderName, m9.name memberBankName, m11.name memberPaywayName, r16.name receiveCompanyName, r17.name receiveShopName, r18.name receiveMemberName, o20.name objectDefineName, p25.name paywayName, r35.name returnPaywayName, c37.name currencyDefineName, c38.name payCurrencyDefineName, u.name creatorName FROM memberPayment m LEFT JOIN application a1 ON a1.isValid=1 AND a1.isLock=0 AND a1.id=m.applicationID LEFT JOIN company c2 ON c2.isValid=1 AND c2.isLock=0 AND c2.id=m.companyID LEFT JOIN site s3 ON s3.isValid=1 AND s3.isLock=0 AND s3.id=m.siteID LEFT JOIN member m4 ON m4.isValid=1 AND m4.isLock=0 AND m4.id=m.memberID LEFT JOIN device d5 ON d5.isValid=1 AND d5.isLock=0 AND d5.id=m.deviceID LEFT JOIN memberOrder m8 ON m8.isValid=1 AND m8.isLock=0 AND m8.id=m.memberOrderID LEFT JOIN memberBank m9 ON m9.isValid=1 AND m9.isLock=0 AND m9.id=m.memberBankID LEFT JOIN memberPayway m11 ON m11.isValid=1 AND m11.isLock=0 AND m11.id=m.memberPaywayID LEFT JOIN company r16 ON r16.isValid=1 AND r16.isLock=0 AND r16.id=m.receiveCompanyID LEFT JOIN shop r17 ON r17.isValid=1 AND r17.isLock=0 AND r17.id=m.receiveShopID LEFT JOIN member r18 ON r18.isValid=1 AND r18.isLock=0 AND r18.id=m.receiveMemberID LEFT JOIN objectDefine o20 ON o20.isValid=1 AND o20.isLock=0 AND o20.id=m.objectDefineID LEFT JOIN payway p25 ON p25.isValid=1 AND p25.isLock=0 AND p25.id=m.paywayID LEFT JOIN payway r35 ON r35.isValid=1 AND r35.isLock=0 AND r35.id=m.returnPaywayID LEFT JOIN currencyDefine c37 ON c37.isValid=1 AND c37.isLock=0 AND c37.id=m.currencyDefineID LEFT JOIN currencyDefine c38 ON c38.isValid=1 AND c38.isLock=0 AND c38.id=m.payCurrencyDefineID LEFT JOIN member u ON u.isValid=1 AND u.isLock=0 AND u.id=m.creator WHERE m.isValid=1 AND m.id=#{id}
